title: euphrasia minima subsp. willkommii
intro: Euphrasia minima subsp. willkommii, also known as small eyebright, is a subspecies of the eyebright plant, a low-growing perennial herb belonging to the mint family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular remedy for soothing eye irritations and infections. The health benefits of Euphrasia minima subsp. willkommii include its ability to reduce swelling and promote the healing of wounds, as well as its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Euphrasia minima subsp. willkommii can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in herbal medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
